products.name: Linear Actuators
products.descriptor: Rugged linear actuators for aerospace and defense actuation applications

evidence.snippet:
*   [![Linear Actuator](https://ametekcdn.azureedge.net/mediafiles/ametekpds/images/products/215_Linear.jpg?h=121&la=en&w=215)](/products/actuators/linear)
    ##### [Linear Actuators](/products/actuators/linear)
    Design and manufacturing of industry leading Linear Actuator solutions for the global aerospace and defense industry
    [Keep Reading](/products/actuators/linear)

*   50 lb force to 5,000 lb force
*   Up to 16-inch stroke
*   Integral brakes, clutches, fail safe release
*   Limit switches and position indication
*   Driven with brushed and brushless motors
